ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: water, sunflower oil, yoghurt (12%), sugar, corn starch, mustard, wine vinegar, egg yolks, salt, milk powder, acidifier (lactic acid), preservatives (potassium sorbate potassium, benzoate sodium), spices, aroma, and antioxidant (e385), suggestion of use: salads, vegetables,
